title: Stylized Meadow Grass
description: A stylized grass field with instanced authored blade clusters, image-driven path masking, per-instance origin and facing attributes, circular-arc rooted wind, travelling gusts, tip flutter, static clump color patches, macro brightness variation, translucency, and rim light.
techniques: travelling gust and tip flutter fields
world-space clump and macro color variation
image-sampled rooted blade masks around an inspection path
